scripts.build:cloudflare: npm run build:widget && npm run build:worker
scripts.preview: npm run build:widget && npm run build:worker && wrangler dev

CONVEX_DEPLOY_KEY.description: Recommended. A Convex Production Deploy Key from your Convex dashboard, used to deploy the blank Convex project and inject the app URL during the Cloudflare build.

SITE_URL.description: Optional final public URL of this support deployment, for example `https://support.example.com`. Leave unset to use the Cloudflare workers.dev hostname.

HELP_CENTER_HOST.description: Optional dedicated docs hostname, such as `docs.example.com`. Leave unset if you want `/help` on the main app domain.

POSTMARK_SERVER_TOKEN.description: Optional Postmark server token for outbound email replies.

POSTMARK_INBOUND_ADDRESS.description: Optional reply-to address used for inbound Postmark threading.

POSTMARK_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Optional shared secret for validating inbound Postmark webhooks.

DEFAULT_FROM_EMAIL.description: Optional fallback sender address, such as `support@example.com`.

INBOUND_ORG_ID.description: Optional organization override for inbound email routing. Leave unset for single-workspace installs.

SLACK_BOT_TOKEN.description: Optional Slack bot token if you want Slack integration.

SLACK_CHANNEL_ID.description: Optional default Slack channel ID for support threads.

SLACK_SIGNING_SECRET.description: Optional Slack signing secret for inbound event verification.
